channel.title: Lua on xyanrch's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Lua on xyanrch's Blog

item.title: Building a REPL for a Scripting Language
item.description: Designing an interactive Read-Eval-Print Loop for the kai scripting language — multi-line input, expression auto-printing, state persistence, and graceful error recovery.

item.title: Building a Lua-like Language Frontend in C++
item.description: From lexer and parser to bytecode compiler — building a Lua-like language frontend for a stack-based VM.
